title: M&G PLASTIC PEN HOLDER ( 92 X 61 X 202MM * DEPTH 118MM )
subtitle: M&G PLASTIC PEN HOLDER
overview: Our M&G Plastic Pen Holder is made of high-quality plastic that is both lightweight and sturdy. It features a three-dimensional storage design that saves space and can hold a large number of pens, pencils, markers, and other writing instruments. Measuring 92 x 61 x 202mm with a depth of 118mm, it is compact and fits easily on a desk or bookshelf. The pen holder is not only functional but also has a sleek and modern look that enhances the aesthetics of any workspace.
